product_overview: A production-grade Next.js 14 frontend for a QR-driven restaurant ordering and staff management system, providing customer QR-menu ordering and a full staff portal (dashboard, orders, KDS, billing, analytics, users, QR generation, and settings). The UI follows a compact PetPooja-inspired design system and supports real-time order updates via WebSocket.
core_goals: Provide a polished, production-ready Next.js 14 frontend implementing all customer (QR menu, cart, order tracking) and staff (dashboard, orders, kitchen display, billing, analytics, users, QR codes, settings) workflows.
Implement robust authentication, role-based access control, resilent API integration (axios with refresh), optimistic UI where appropriate, and real-time updates via WebSocket.
Deliver compact, information-dense PetPooja-style UI components (sidebar, KPI cards, tables, badges, modals) and a separate warm customer-facing menu experience.
Ship complete form validation (React Hook Form + Zod), loading/error/empty states, accessibility-conscious components, and production-ready build/config (Tailwind theme, types, providers).

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Staff sign-in with email/password, token refresh handling, role-based redirect and route guarding for staff area.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email address -> Fill password -> Click "Sign In" -> See loading spinner on Login button -> Receive access token and user object from POST /api/auth/login -> Store token in auth store -> Redirect based on role to /staff/kitchen or /staff/orders or /staff/dashboard -> See staff layout (sidebar + header)

Navigate to /login -> Fill email address -> Fill password -> Click "Sign In" -> Receive 401 from POST /api/auth/login -> See red error banner below button with message 'Invalid credentials' -> Remain on /login

features.name: Customer Ordering Flow (QR Menu)
features.description: Customer browses a QR-linked menu, adds items to cart, places an order and tracks its status in real-time.
user_flows: Navigate to /menu/1 -> See restaurant name and Table 1 chip in header -> Browse menu categories by scrolling category pills -> Click menu item 'Spring Rolls' -> Click 'Add +' on 'Spring Rolls' -> See quantity stepper on the item card -> See sticky bottom cart bar update item count and total -> Click sticky bottom cart bar 'View Cart' -> Navigate to /cart -> See cart items list and order notes input -> Click 'Place Order' -> See loading state on 'Place Order' -> POST /api/orders returns success with orderId 123 -> Redirect to /order-status/123 -> See order status stepper start at CREATED

Navigate to /menu/1 -> Add items to cart -> Click sticky bottom cart bar 'View Cart' -> Click 'Place Order' -> POST /api/orders returns 5xx or network error -> See error toast 'Server error, try again' -> Remain on /cart and allow retry

features.name: Order Status Tracking (Customer)
features.description: Customer monitors order progress via a status stepper that polls or uses WebSocket for real-time updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /order-status/123 -> See animated status stepper showing CREATED -> Poll or open WebSocket connection for order events -> Receive server event updating status to IN_KITCHEN -> See stepper animate to IN_KITCHEN and message 'Your order is being prepared 🍳' -> Receive READY update -> See stepper advance to READY and final friendly message
Navigate to /order-status/123 -> Open WebSocket connection fails and polls return 5xx -> See error banner 'Unable to fetch order status' -> Page retries polling every 5s and shows last known status

features.name: Staff Dashboard
features.description: Overview landing page with KPI stat cards, revenue and top-items charts, and a recent orders table for fast operational insight.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/dashboard -> See header and left sidebar -> See 4 KPI stat cards load with numbers and trend chips -> GET /api/analytics/revenue called -> See Revenue line chart render -> GET /api/analytics/top-items called -> See Top Items bar chart render -> See Recent Orders table populated
Navigate to /staff/dashboard -> GET /api/analytics/revenue returns 5xx -> See chart skeletons and error toast 'Server error, try again' -> KPI cards show skeleton placeholders

features.name: Orders Management
features.description: Full-width order list with search, status filters, row hover actions and a slide-over order detail panel with role-aware status controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/orders -> See search input and status filter tabs -> Type '123' in search -> See filtered results in table -> Click row for Order#123 -> Slide-over panel opens with order details -> Click role-appropriate 'Confirm' button -> PUT /api/orders/123/status returns success -> See status badge update in slide-over and table
Navigate to /staff/orders -> Click 'Update Status' on Order#123 -> PUT /api/orders/123/status returns 403 -> See 'Access denied' toast -> Order status remains unchanged

features.name: Kitchen Display System (KDS)
features.description: Full-screen dark-mode board showing active tickets, elapsed timers with urgency coloring, and quick status actions to progress kitchen work.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/kitchen -> See fixed header with live clock and restaurant name -> See grid of ticket cards showing CONFIRMED and IN_KITCHEN orders -> See Order#123 ticket with elapsed timer white color (<5min) -> Click 'Start Cooking' on Order#123 -> PUT /api/orders/123/status with IN_KITCHEN -> See ticket status badge change to IN_KITCHEN and timer continue -> Click 'Mark Ready' -> PUT /api/orders/123/status with READY -> See ticket fade out after 3 seconds
Navigate to /staff/kitchen -> Click 'Start Cooking' on Order#123 -> PUT /api/orders/123/status returns network error -> See error toast 'Server error, try again' -> Ticket remains at CONFIRMED

features.name: Billing & Payments
features.description: Generate invoices and collect payments for served orders with tax and discount handling and payment method options (Cash/Card/UPI).
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/orders -> Click 'Proceed to Billing' on Order#123 -> Navigate to /staff/billing/123 -> See order summary and right panel totals with tax and discount inputs -> Click 'Select CARD' payment method -> Click 'Collect Payment' -> POST /api/billing/123/payments returns success -> PUT /api/orders/123/status to PAID -> See success toast 'Payment recorded' and order status update

Navigate to /staff/orders -> Click 'Proceed to Billing' on Order#123 -> Navigate to /staff/billing/123 -> Click 'Collect Payment' -> POST /api/billing/123/payments returns failure -> See error toast 'Payment failed' -> Payment not recorded and order remains SERVED

features.name: Analytics
features.description: Manager-level charts and summary stats for revenue, orders and top items with adjustable date ranges.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/analytics -> See date range picker default to Last 30 days -> Select 'Last 30 days' -> GET /api/analytics/revenue and /api/analytics/top-items return data -> Revenue area chart renders -> Orders bar chart renders -> Summary stats display Total Revenue and Avg Order Value

Navigate to /staff/analytics -> Select custom date range with no data -> GET /api/analytics endpoints return empty sets -> See empty state describing 'No data for selected range' and chart placeholders

features.name: Users (Staff) Management
features.description: Create, edit, deactivate staff accounts with role selection and role-badged listings.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/users -> Click 'Add Staff' -> Fill name, email, temp password, select role 'WAITER' -> Click 'Add' -> POST /api/users returns success -> See new user row appear in users table with role badge

Navigate to /staff/users -> Click 'Add Staff' -> Fill email already in use -> Click 'Add' -> POST /api/users returns validation 400 -> See inline validation error near email field 'Email already taken' and remain in modal

features.name: QR Codes Generation
features.description: Generate and persist table-specific QR codes that encode the customer menu URL, with download and local persistence.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/qr-codes -> Fill table number '5' in input -> Click 'Generate' -> Generate QR encoding [NEXT_PUBLIC_CUSTOMER_URL]/menu/5 -> Display QR card in grid with 'Table 5' label -> Click 'Download PNG' -> Download PNG of QR
Navigate to /staff/qr-codes -> Fill invalid table number '' -> Click 'Generate' -> Show inline validation error 'Enter a table number' and prevent QR generation

features.name: Restaurant Settings
features.description: Super-admin settings for restaurant profile, currency, timezone and tax rate with optimistic updates and role guard.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/settings -> See settings form populated from GET /api/restaurant/settings -> Change Tax Rate to '5' -> Click 'Save Changes' -> PUT /api/restaurant/settings returns success -> See success toast 'Settings saved' and form reflect saved values
Navigate to /staff/settings as non-SUPER_ADMIN -> Attempt to access page -> Receive 403 from API or route guard -> See 'Access denied' toast and redirect to /staff/dashboard

routes.description: Kitchen Display System (KDS) for tracking active orders

user_interactions: Update order status to "In Kitchen" or "Ready"
